message:
Bound 4 remaining unbounded struct-field Vec pushes in tools modules

- evidence_replay_validator: self.results bounded to MAX_RESULTS (4096)
- transparent_reports: corrective_actions bounded to MAX_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS (256)
- migration_validation_cohorts: project_ids bounded to MAX_PROJECTS_PER_COHORT (4096)
- verifier_benchmark_releases: artifacts bounded to MAX_ARTIFACTS_PER_RELEASE (256)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
